definition: To face, begin to deal with, or take on a difficult problem or task.
sample_sentence: Es necesario abordar el problema de la optimización móvil. (It is necessary to tackle the mobile optimization issue.)

definition: A strong feeling of wishing for something or wanting something to happen.
sample_sentence: Su mayor anhelo era hablar inglés con fluidez. (Her greatest desire was to speak English fluently.)

definition: Requiring immediate attention or action; crucial and time-sensitive.
sample_sentence: Tenemos una necesidad apremiante de actualizar el software. (We have a pressing need to update the software.)

definition: Firmly established and difficult to change or remove.
sample_sentence: Es un hábito muy arraigado en la cultura local. (It is a habit deeply ingrained in the local culture.)

definition: A period of rapid economic growth, popularity, or high development.
sample_sentence: El auge de la inteligencia artificial está cambiando la web. (The boom of artificial intelligence is changing the web.)

meaning: To guarantee, to support, to back
definition: To give support, approval, or a formal guarantee to a statement, person, or project.
sample_sentence: Los datos científicos avalan esta metodología de aprendizaje. (Scientific data back this learning methodology.)

definition: No longer valid because a specific time limit has been reached.
sample_sentence: El enlace de descarga del juego está caducado. (The game download link is expired.)

definition: Attentive to potential dangers or risks; careful in actions or decisions.
sample_sentence: El desarrollador es cauto al cambiar la base de datos. (The developer is cautious when changing the database.)

definition: A combination of events or circumstances at a particular time.
sample_sentence: La coyuntura económica actual favorece a las startups tecnológicas. (The current economic situation favors tech startups.)

definition: To cause someone to lose confidence, enthusiasm, or the will to proceed.
sample_sentence: No dejes que los errores iniciales te desalienten. (Do not let initial errors discourage you.)

definition: To release a powerful force, emotion, or event suddenly.
sample_sentence: El nuevo diseño desató un gran entusiasmo en los usuarios. (The new design unleashed great enthusiasm among users.)

meaning: To rule out, to dismiss, to discard
definition: To remove from consideration; to decide that something is not useful or possible.
sample_sentence: Podemos descartar los errores de red por ahora. (We can rule out network errors for now.)

definition: To make a difficult or mysterious concept clearer and easier to understand.
sample_sentence: Queremos desmitificar el aprendizaje de idiomas con juegos. (We want to demystify language learning with games.)

definition: The action of bringing resources, software, or systems into effective action.
sample_sentence: El despliegue de la nueva versión fue un éxito rotundo. (The deployment of the new version was a total success.)

definition: Capability or cleverness in using the hands, mind, or a specific tool.
sample_sentence: Jugar requiere destreza y concentración rápida. (Playing requires skill and fast concentration.)

definition: Not clear or distinct; spread out over a large area instead of concentrated.
sample_sentence: La línea entre el juego y la educación es difusa aquí. (The line between gaming and education is blurred here.)

definition: Successful in producing a desired or intended technical or practical result.
sample_sentence: El renderizado en canvas es un método eficaz para móviles. (Canvas rendering is an effective method for mobiles.)

definition: To express warm approval, admiration, or high regard for an achievement.
sample_sentence: La comunidad elogió la velocidad de carga de la web. (The community praised the loading speed of the website.)

definition: To commit oneself to and begin an enterprise, business, or path.
sample_sentence: Decidió emprender un nuevo proyecto de software educativo. (He decided to undertake a new educational software project.)

definition: A way of dealing with a situation, a technical problem, or a strategy.
sample_sentence: Nuestro enfoque técnico utiliza un aislamiento absoluto. (Our technical approach uses absolute isolation.)

meaning: To hinder, to obstruct, to slow down
definition: To make a process or action difficult or slow to progress.
sample_sentence: Las dependencias pesadas pueden entorpecer el rendimiento. (Heavy dependencies can hinder performance.)

meaning: To entail, to involve, to imply
definition: To require or involve something as a necessary accompaniment or consequence.
sample_sentence: Este cambio de arquitectura puede entrañar algunos riesgos. (This architecture change may entail some risks.)

definition: To give a main points summary or a rough drawing of an idea or project.
sample_sentence: El ingeniero empezó a esbozar el nuevo PRD de GEO. (The engineer began to outline the new GEO PRD.)

definition: The visual distortion of an object viewed from an extreme artistic perspective.
sample_sentence: El diseño gráfico del juego utiliza un escorzo dramático. (The graphic design of the game uses a dramatic foreshortening.)

definition: Great care, attention, and effort spent on completing a task perfectly.
sample_sentence: El código fue escrito con mucho esmero y limpieza. (The code was written with a lot of care and cleanliness.)

definition: Occurring at irregular intervals or only in a few places; scattered.
sample_sentence: Los errores esporádicos son los más difíciles de depurar. (Sporadic errors are the hardest to debug.)

definition: A state of no progress, growth, or technical activity development.
sample_sentence: Debemos evitar el estancamiento del tráfico web. (We must avoid the stagnation of web traffic.)

definition: Examining, including, or considering all elements or aspects completely.
sample_sentence: Realizamos un análisis exhaustivo de las métricas SEO. (We conducted a thorough analysis of the SEO metrics.)

definition: Possible to achieve or execute easily or conveniently within constraints.
sample_sentence: Migrar los datos en formato JSON a Firebase es factible. (Migrating the JSON data to Firebase is feasible.)

meaning: To encourage, to promote, to foster
definition: To encourage the development or growth of something positive.
sample_sentence: Queremos fomentar el hábito de estudio diario. (We want to encourage the habit of daily study.)

definition: Happening by a lucky accident or chance rather than design.
sample_sentence: Fue un encuentro fortuito que cambió nuestra estrategia. (It was a fortuitous encounter that changed our strategy.)

definition: An act or instance of failing; lack of success in an objective.
sample_sentence: El fracaso del servidor se debió a una sobrecarga de API. (The server failure was due to an API overload.)

definition: To give an award, prize, or special recognition to someone or something.
sample_sentence: La app fue galardonada por su innovación educativa. (The app was awarded for its educational innovation.)

definition: A complete range or spectrum of different things, features, or colors.
sample_sentence: El portal ofrece una amplia gama de vocabulario avanzado. (The portal offers a wide range of advanced vocabulary.)

definition: The process of dealing with or controlling things, projects, or users.
sample_sentence: Una buena gestión de memoria evita bloqueos en móviles. (Good memory management avoids crashes on mobiles.)

definition: Special importance, value, or prominence given to something.
sample_sentence: El PRD hace hincapié en la estructura de metadatos. (The PRD emphasizes the metadata structure.)

definition: Of the same kind; alike; uniform throughout a system structure.
sample_sentence: Mantener un diseño homogéneo ayuda a la experiencia de usuario. (Maintaining a uniform design helps the user experience.)

definition: Appropriate or perfect for a particular purpose or technical use case.
sample_sentence: El entorno de sandbox es idóneo para aislar los juegos. (The sandbox environment is ideal for isolating games.)

definition: A hindrance or obstruction in doing something or making progress.
sample_sentence: La falta de internet es un impedimento para la app web. (The lack of internet is an obstacle for the web app.)

meaning: To imply, to involve, to mean
definition: To strongly suggest the truth or necessity of a particular outcome.
sample_sentence: Aumentar el número de juegos implica mejorar el backend. (Increasing the number of games involves improving the backend.)

definition: An unforeseen occurrence that disrupts normal plans or systems.
sample_sentence: Tuvimos que solucionar un imprevisto en el servidor de base de datos. (We had to solve an unexpected event in the database server.)

definition: To provide someone with an incentive or a reason to do something.
sample_sentence: Las recompensas diarias ayudan a incentivar al estudiante. (Daily rewards help to motivate the student.)

definition: A state of limited knowledge where it is impossible to exactly describe a future state.
sample_sentence: Las actualizaciones de Google generan incertidumbre en el SEO. (Google updates generate uncertainty in SEO.)

meaning: To investigate, to inquire, to look into
definition: To search into or investigate thoroughly to find facts or bugs.
sample_sentence: Necesitamos indagar más sobre los fallos de iOS Safari. (We need to look into the iOS Safari bugs more thoroughly.)

definition: The basic or inherent character, quality, or nature of something.
sample_sentence: Es un problema de índole técnica, no de diseño visual. (It is a problem of a technical nature, not visual design.)

definition: Certain to happen; impossible to prevent or evade.
sample_sentence: Los cambios de algoritmos de búsqueda son inevitables. (Search algorithm changes are inevitable.)

definition: To include or connect someone or something as a necessary part of an activity.
sample_sentence: El desarrollo de los micro-juegos va a involucrar a todo el equipo. (The micro-games development will involve the whole team.)

meaning: To carry out, to execute, to perform
definition: To bring a technical task, project, or plan to a successful completion.
sample_sentence: Vamos a llevar a cabo la migración a Firebase más adelante. (We will carry out the Firebase migration later.)

definition: A subtle distinction or variation in meaning, expression, or color.
sample_sentence: Cada palabra de nivel C1 tiene un matiz de significado específico. (Each C1 level word has a specific nuance of meaning.)

definition: A plan or course of action taken to achieve a particular operational purpose.
sample_sentence: El equipo tomó medidas severas para proteger la seguridad de los datos. (The team took strict measures to protect data security.)

meaning: To mitigate, to alleviate, to ease
definition: To make a technical problem, error, or server load less severe or serious.
sample_sentence: Usar un sistema de caché ayuda a mitigar la carga del servidor. (Using a cache system helps to mitigate server load.)

definition: A small part or quantity intended to show what the whole database asset is like.
sample_sentence: Este archivo JSON es una muestra del vocabulario completo. (This JSON file is a sample of the full vocabulary.)

definition: Worthy of attention; striking or significant improvement.
sample_sentence: La velocidad de renderizado experimentó un cambio notable. (The rendering speed experienced a notable change.)

definition: New, unusual, or original in an interesting or practical way.
sample_sentence: El enfoque de los shell de juego independientes es novedoso. (The independent game shell approach is novel.)

definition: To make the best or most effective use of a technical resource or situation.
sample_sentence: Debemos optimizar los archivos JSON antes de cargarlos. (We must optimize the JSON files before loading them.)

definition: A set of explicit rules or criteria indicating how something should be done.
sample_sentence: Sigue las pautas del PRD para estructurar las colecciones. (Follow the PRD guidelines to structure the collections.)

definition: To become aware or conscious of something thoroughly through the senses.
sample_sentence: Los usuarios pueden percibir un retardo si no usas Pointer Events. (Users can perceive a lag if you do not use Pointer Events.)

definition: Causing harm, damage, or rendering system speed inefficient.
sample_sentence: Tener demasiados elementos DOM es perjudicial para móviles. (Having too many DOM elements is detrimental for mobiles.)

definition: Without being affected by the factor or circumstance mentioned.
sample_sentence: El juego funciona bien pese a las limitaciones del navegador. (The game runs fine despite browser limitations.)

definition: The act of stating, formulating, or positioning a conceptual problem.
sample_sentence: Su planteamiento arquitectónico resolvió los fallos de scroll. (His architectural approach solved the scroll failures.)

definition: The clear period of time within which something must be done or completed.
sample_sentence: El plazo para entregar los nuevos 6 shells termina pronto. (The deadline to deliver the 6 new shells ends soon.)

meaning: To weigh, to analyze, to ponder
definition: To review, weigh, or consider options carefully before making a final choice.
sample_sentence: Debemos ponderar las ventajas de Cloud Firestore frente a Realtime Database. (We must weigh the advantages of Cloud Firestore against Realtime Database.)

definition: A small, specific, or minor structural detail of a plan or system.
sample_sentence: El döküman explica cada pormenor de la integración de API. (The document explains every detail of the API integration.)

definition: The conceptual attitude or structural position adopted toward an issue.
sample_sentence: Nuestra postura es mantener el código fuente lo más limpio posible. (Our stance is to keep the source code as clean as possible.)

definition: To come or go before something else in time, order, or spatial position.
sample_sentence: La validación de datos debe preceder al almacenamiento permanente. (Data validation must precede permanent storage.)

definition: A previous statement or proposition from which another logical conclusion is drawn.
sample_sentence: Partimos de la premisa de que el sistema debe ser multiplataforma. (We start from the premise that the system must be cross-platform.)

meaning: To do without, to discard, to dispense with
definition: To manage to live or operate without a specific element or privilege.
sample_sentence: Podemos prescindir de las librerías CSS pesadas en los juegos. (We can do without heavy CSS libraries in games.)

definition: To prove more powerful or superior than opposing forces; remain dominant.
sample_sentence: Los estándares open-source suelen prevalecer en el ecosistema web. (Open-source standards usually prevail in the web ecosystem.)

meaning: To foresee, to predict, to anticipate
definition: To anticipate or see a technical need or event before it happens.
sample_sentence: Es difícil prever todos los fallos de los navegadores antiguos. (It is hard to foresee all old browser bugs.)

meaning: To promote, to facilitate, to foster
definition: To create favorable conditions to cause something good to happen.
sample_sentence: Aislar el CSS ayuda a propiciar un renderizado fluido. (Isolating the CSS helps to promote smooth rendering.)

definition: To make something available, to supply a necessary database asset or data.
sample_sentence: El servidor debe proporcionar las traducciones instantáneamente. (The server must provide the translations instantly.)

definition: Acting with or showing careful care and thought for the future.
sample_sentence: Es prudente probar el JSON de forma local antes de subirlo. (It is wise to test the JSON locally before uploading.)

meaning: To lie in, to consist of, to be based on
definition: To have its root, base, or core reason inside a specific factor.
sample_sentence: La solución radica en cambiar el manejo de eventos táctiles. (The solution lies in changing touch event handling.)

definition: A distinctive attribute or aspect of something conceptual or visual.
sample_sentence: El rasgo principal del shell es su adaptabilidad de pantalla. (The main feature of the shell is its screen adaptability.)

definition: To begin operational execution again after a pause or interruption.
sample_sentence: El usuario puede reanudar la partida de kelime ezberleme cuando quiera. (The user can resume the vocabulary matching match whenever they want.)

meaning: To compile, to gather, to collect
definition: To collect information, logs, or data metrics from multiple source materials.
sample_sentence: Vamos a recopilar todos los pares de idiomas en archivos separados. (We will gather all language pairs in separate files.)

meaning: To turn to, to resort to, to make use of
definition: To turn to a specific technical option or asset for help in a difficult case.
sample_sentence: Tuvimos que recurrir a la escala de matrices CSS para ajustar la pantalla. (We had to resort to CSS matrix scaling to adjust the screen.)

meaning: To result in, to lead to
definition: To contribute or result in a major advantage or consequence for a system.
sample_sentence: Optimizar el código va a redundar en una mejor retención de usuarios. (Optimizing code will result in better user retention.)

definition: To strengthen an existing system framework, database, or learning habit.
sample_sentence: El arcade ajuda a reforzar el aprendizaje mecánico de palabras. (The arcade helps to reinforce mechanical word learning.)

definition: A widespread, indirect, or long-term consequence of an event or action.
sample_sentence: El cambio de diseño tuvo una repercusión muy positiva en el SEO. (The design change had a very positive impact on SEO.)

definition: To draw special attention or visual emphasis to an element or phrase.
sample_sentence: El panel debe resaltar las palabras falladas por el usuario. (The panel must highlight the words missed by the user.)

definition: A safe copy of database assets, or professional architectural support.
sample_sentence: Siempre haz un respaldo de tus archivos JSON locales. (Always make a backup of your local JSON files.)

definition: To keep something within clean specific limits, bounds, or system boundaries.
sample_sentence: Debemos restringir el acceso a la base de datos de producción. (We must restrict access to the production database.)

definition: To continue to have or hold possession of data variables or user attention.
sample_sentence: Los juegos dinámicos ayudan a retener a los estudiantes premium. (Dynamic games help to retain premium students.)

definition: A call to prove structural capabilities, or a difficult task requiring effort.
sample_sentence: Hacer que 6 shells funcionen en cualquier móvil es un gran reto. (Making 6 shells work on any mobile is a big challenge.)

definition: Extremely thorough, accurate, or consistent with strict standard criteria.
sample_sentence: El sistema se sometió a un control de calidad riguroso. (The system underwent a rigorous quality check.)

definition: An exception, caveat, or a warning qualification attached to a statement.
sample_sentence: El código funciona en todas partes, con la salvedad de versiones viejas de iOS. (The code works everywhere, with the exception of old iOS versions.)

definition: A secondary result or consequence, typically an unwelcome or painful one.
sample_sentence: La caída del servidor dejó secuelas en los logs de analítica. (The server crash left consequences in the analytics logs.)

definition: A disproportionate weight in favor of or against an idea or thing.
sample_sentence: Tenemos que evitar el sesgo en el algoritmo de recomendación. (We need to avoid bias in the recommendation algorithm.)

definition: Dependable; reliable; based on solid structural architecture or facts.
sample_sentence: Construir un backend sólido ahorra cientos de horas de desarrollo. (Building a solid backend saves hundreds of development hours.)

definition: To cause a system or element to undergo a particular experience or test.
sample_sentence: Vamos a someter la app web a una prueba de carga pesada. (We will subject the web app to a heavy load test.)

meaning: To remedy, to correct, to fix
definition: To fix a bug, correct a defect, or remedy a difficult system situation.
sample_sentence: El último parche sirvió para subsanar los fallos del puntero. (The last patch served to correct the pointer failures.)

meaning: To sustain, to support, to hold up
definition: To strengthen or support the logical validity of an argument or structure.
sample_sentence: Los informes de rendimiento sustentan nuestra decisión de escalado. (Performance reports support our scaling decision.)

definition: Leaving no room for doubt or confusion; absolute and direct definition.
sample_sentence: La respuesta del arquitecto fue un no tajante a usar frameworks obsoletos. (The architect's answer was an unequivocal no to using obsolete frameworks.)

definition: Perceptible by touch; clear and definite; real structural value.
sample_sentence: La gamificación ofrece resultados tangibles en pocas semanas. (Gamification offers tangible results within a few weeks.)

definition: Of great significance, value, or far-reaching consequences for a system.
sample_sentence: Elegir la base de datos correcta es un paso trascendental. (Choosing the correct database is a crucial step.)

definition: Thinking or communicating in an unfocused, unclear, or indefinite manner.
sample_sentence: No nos sirve una explicación vaga del error de consola. (A vague explanation of the console error is not useful to us.)

definition: Currently valid, operational, or in force within a system ecosystem.
sample_sentence: La clave de API compartida sigue estando vigente hoy. (The shared API key remains valid today.)

meaning: To link, to bind, to connect
definition: To connect or link two independent structural data blocks together.
sample_sentence: El script ayuda a vincular cada token de usuario con su puntuación. (The script helps to link each user token with their score.)

definition: Capable of working, developing, or running successfully in production.
sample_sentence: Un modelo offline temporal es completamente viable en esta fase. (A temporary offline model is completely viable at this stage.)
